description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged into 6 different sessions/devices
AND the user is playing back game content on 5 of the sessions/devices

steps.action:
WHEN the user attempts to playback game content on a 6th session/device
AND the Account Error modal displays
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Account Error. Your account is currently in use at another location. Reset your password by logging in to mlb.com, and click on the profile icon to change your password. Press select to go back."
